title: The Engineer Modpack
description: You like engineering ? Try out this modpack !
body:
You like engineering ? Try the engineer modpack !
With 70+ mods, try creating and experimenting everything you want with your engineering mind ;)

You like using machines and create automatization ? Try out this modpack !
You like doing stuff with electricity ? Try out this modpack !
You like to create vehicules ? Moving strucutures ? Try out this modpack !

With lots of core mods like create and mekanism and addons for this mods, you'll find everything you want. 

Create, deploy and show the world your engineering skills with **The Engineer Modpack** !
